description: 70 - 11-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

participants.name: Emails between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

text:
Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

From: Oliver Robbins EMAIL
Sent: Tue 11/02/2025 8:52:56 PM (UTC)

To: Peter Mandelson EMAIL
Subject: Re: state visit

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Thank you Peter. Understood. I’ve been in touch with Clive today on this, and Ailsa and spoke
to the PM yesterday evening. We can pick this up in our catch up tomorrow.

Olly

Oliver Robbins
FCDO

From: Peter Mandelson
Sel uesday, February 11, 2025 5:41:23 PM
To: Oliver Robbins
Subject: state visit

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Perhaps we could discuss?
Very best
Peter

206
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
